tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work3/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Print title and sections s5, s6, s13, s14
print('title:', data['title'])
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s5', 's6', 's13', 's14']:
        print(f\"--- {s['id']}: {s['title']} ---\")
        print(s['content'][:1000])
        print()
"

python3 -c "
import json
with open('/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work3/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
for s in data['sections']:
    if s['id'] in ['s5', 's6', 's13', 's14']:
        print(f\"--- {s['id']}: {s['title']} ---\")
        print(s['content'][:1500])
        print()
"
